base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_magic_items_batch — a ui from 1994 final fantasy vi. All UI: ATB battle-system UI + equip/magic/relic menus + opera scene cutscenes + Cyan's dream + Dancing Mad music-sync finale. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
